name: myosinck

metadata.name: MyosinCK
metadata.summary: The goal of this program is to establish a visualization tool tailored to describing cardiac-specific muscle dynamics and how the alterations of parameters mentioned above (due to disease mutations) can impact the efficiency of muscle dynamics.

documentation:
# Myosin-Crossbridge-Cycling-Kinetics
Crossbridge cycling is one of the most important and conserved biological mechanism. This process is governed by the biochemical and biomechanical interactions within the sarcomere. Here I plan to create a software package to better investigate the multitude of enzyme rate laws involved in contraction as well as produce a 2D visualizations.
